metadata.description: planfi skills — financial planning and real-estate investment analysis powered by the public planfi MCP.

plugins.name: retirement-income
plugins.description: Plan retirement decumulation: tax-smart withdrawal order, Social Security claiming age, ACA healthcare bridge before Medicare, estate-tax exposure, and guaranteed income — pension lump-sum vs lifetime monthly and whether a SPIA/QLAC beats a DIY portfolio. Thin orchestration over the planfi MCP.
